description: He who wills goodness and mercy for all His creatures, embracing both believers and non-believers with infinite benevolence.
He who bestows specialized, continuous mercy upon the believers in both worlds, ensuring their success and ultimate salvation.
The absolute Owner, Ruler, and King of all creation, whose authority is infinite, eternal, and free from any defect.
The One who is absolutely pure, sanctified, and free from any imperfection, error, weakness, or human attributes.
The One who is free from all flaws and the Giver of peace, security, and tranquility to His creation in this life and the hereafter.
The Giver of security, faith, and protection. He who validates the faith of His servants and protects them from absolute injustice.
The Witness, Guardian, and Preserver of all things. He who observes all secrets, deeds, and thoughts of His creations.
The All-Mighty, Peerless Sovereign. He who is invincible and whom no power can oppose or defeat.
The One who repairs all broken affairs, heals hearts, and carries out His absolute will across all kingdoms of the cosmos.
The Supreme, Majestic and Grand, who reveals His grandeur in every aspect of creation and is far above all forms of comparison.
He who designs and creates everything out of absolute nothingness, determining its attributes and destiny.
He who creates without template, bringing substances into existence and differentiating all shapes and species in absolute harmony.
The Shaper of beauty, who gives everything its distinct, unique form, color, and characteristics.
He who forgives sins repeatedly, covering the faults of His servants in this world and overlooking them in the next.
The All-Conquering Subduer who holds the ultimate control over everything, and before whom the entire creation bows down.
The Giver of all gifts, who showers His endless blessings and bounties upon His creatures without expecting any return.
The Sustainer and Provider of all life, who creates and distributes physical and spiritual nourishment to every soul.
The Opener who unlocks the doors of mercy, success, knowledge, and spiritual guidance for His servants.
The All-Knowing, from whose knowledge nothing is hidden, whether manifest or hidden, in the heavens or on earth.
He who contracts sustenance, lives, and spirits according to His wisdom, testing patience and reliance.
The Expander who enlarges provision, hearts, and mercy, showing His immense generosity and grace.
He who abases the arrogant, the tyrants, and those who rebel against righteousness, reducing them to lowliness.
He who exalts the humble, the righteous, and those who seek knowledge, raising their status in both worlds.
He who grants honor, strength, and victory to whom He wills, elevating their dignity.
He who deprives of honor and humbles the oppressor, showing that absolute power belongs only to Him.
He who hears all sounds, silent whispers, and prayers, without the need of ears or physical channels.
He who sees all things—even a black ant on a black stone in the pitch-dark night—without physical eyes.
The Ultimate Arbiter whose judgments are absolute, perfectly wise, and free from any form of bias or injustice.
The embodiment of absolute justice, who acts in perfect fairness and gives every soul exactly what it deserves.
The Subtly Kind, who is highly gentle with His servants and knows the finest hidden details of all occurrences.
The All-Aware who knows the inner secrets, realities, and outcomes of everything in existence.
The Clement and Forbearing, who does not hasten to punish His servants for their errors, giving them time to repent.
The Magnificent, whose grandeur is infinite and beyond the grasp of human intellect, time, or space.
The All-Forgiving who conceals and pardons the largest transgressions, replacing them with mercy.
The Grateful who rewards the smallest righteous deed with abundant, never-ending blessings in this life and the next.
The Supreme One who is above everything in rank, authority, power, and essence.
The Great, whose greatness is absolute and far beyond any human comprehension or measure.
The Preserver and Guardian who protects the cosmos from collapse and keeps safe the deeds and lives of His creatures.
The Nourisher and Maintainer who determines and supplies physical and spiritual nourishment to every single creation.
The Sufficient Reckoner who is fully enough for His servants and who takes account of all actions in the universe.
The Majestic and Sublime, who is owner of absolute grandeur, beauty, and perfection in attributes.
The Generous Benefactor who gives continuously even before being asked, and pardons out of absolute grace.
The Watchful Guardian who observes all creations, monitoring every movement, breath, and thought in absolute proximity.
The Responsive One who answers the calls, supplications, and needs of all His creatures, granting them relief.
The Vast, whose mercy, knowledge, and abundance are all-encompassing and know no boundaries.
The Wise, who does everything with ultimate purpose, precision, and perfect wisdom.
The Loving One who is full of pure affection and love for His servants, drawing them closer to Him with His blessings.
The Glorious, who is full of absolute honor, nobility, grandeur, and infinite praise.
The Resurrector who will raise all souls from their graves on the Day of Judgment to face absolute accountability.
The Omnipresent Witness who is present everywhere and from whom absolutely nothing in existence can hide.
The Absolute Truth, who exists unconditionally and eternally, and whose word, laws, and promises are the pure truth.
The Trustee who manages all affairs of His creations with absolute care, and upon whom all believers place their ultimate trust.
The Possessor of absolute, infinite strength and power, who is never touched by fatigue or weakness.
The Firm, whose power is stable, enduring, and solid. No opposition can ever disrupt His resolve or operations.
The Guardian, Patron, and loving Friend who supports, guides, and protects the believers throughout their journeys.
The All-Praiseworthy, who is worthy of absolute praise in Himself, regardless of whether creations praise Him or not.
The Counter who keeps a complete record of everything, knowing the exact count of all particles and events in the cosmos.
The Initiator who begins all creations out of non-existence, giving them their initial vital force.
The Restorer who brings back all life after death, reconstructing them to stand on the Day of Judgment.
The Giver of Life who animates matter, creates spirits, and revives dead hearts with faith and knowledge.
The Giver of Death, who decrees the time and manner of death for all living things according to His grand plan.
The Ever-Living, who possesses eternal, perfect life, free from any beginning, end, or human attributes.
The Self-Sustaining Administrator who maintains, preserves, and oversees the entire existence without sleep or fatigue.
The Finder from whom nothing can ever be hidden or lost, possessing ultimate wealth and lack of absolute dependency.
The Illustrious, whose glory and nobility are vast, reflecting perfect beauty and endless generosity.
The One who is unique and undivided in His essence, attributes, actions, and absolute authority.
The Solitary, Singular One. He who has no equal, no child, no partner, and stands perfectly alone in His grandeur.
The Self-Sufficient Refuge to whom all creations turn for their needs, while He is in no need of anything.
The All-Powerful who can carry out whatever He wills, whenever He wills, according to His absolute decree.
The Supreme Determiner whose power is active in executing all affairs and decrees in the entire creation.
He who brings forward whatever He wills—such as events, statuses, and rewards—according to His wisdom.
He who delays or postpones whatever He wills—such as trials, punishments, or occurrences—to an appointed time.
The First, who existed before all creation without any beginning, standing eternally independent.
The Last, who remains eternally after all creation has perished, without any end.
The Manifest, whose existence and power are clearly visible through His countless creations and designs.
The Hidden, who cannot be seen by physical eyes in this world, yet knows all hidden secrets and structures.
The Sole Governor and Planner who administers the entire universe, directing all causes and outcomes.
The Exalted, who is far above all thoughts, comparisons, limitations, and human characteristics.
The Source of absolute goodness, kindness, and virtue, who is extremely gentle and generous to all creations.
He who continuously accepts the sincere repentance of His servants, forgiving their errors and restoring them to grace.
The Avenger who inflicts just punishment upon absolute tyrants and oppressors who reject all warnings.
The Pardoner who completely wipes out all trace of sins and errors, as if they never happened.
The Extremely Pitying and Kind, whose mercy is exceptionally gentle, tender, and protective.
The Owner of absolute dominion, who commands all kingdoms, crowns, and destinies with absolute authority.
The Lord of absolute majesty, grandeur, honor, and generous bounty, who is worthy of absolute veneration.
The Equitable One who establishes justice, removing grievances and bringing perfect balance to all actions.
The Gatherer who unites all creations on the Day of Resurrection, and brings hearts together in harmony.
The Infinite Rich and Self-Sufficient, who stands completely independent of all creations, while all depend on Him.
The Enricher who grants wealth, satisfaction, and independence to whom He wills among His creatures.
The Shielder and Withholder who prevents loss, physical or spiritual harm, protecting His servants from danger.
The Creator of adversity and harm, testing patience and reliance, showing that absolute power is only His.
The Source of all benefit, success, and prosperity, showering His creatures with wholesome advantages.
The Infinite Light who illuminates the heavens and earth, guiding hearts to the truth of His existence.
The Ultimate Guide who directs His servants to the path of truth, success, and eternal salvation.
The Originator of incomparable beauty, who created the entire universe out of absolute nothingness with perfect artistry.
The Everlasting, who remains eternally and unconditionally while all of creation fades and perishes.
The Supreme Inheritor who inherits the entire universe and everything in it after all temporary possessors disappear.
The Perfect Teacher and Guide who directs everything to its appointed purpose in perfect wisdom without error.
The Patient, who does not hasten to act or punish, executing all decisions with absolute calmness and perfect timing.
